header: Everything your team needs, one click away
subheadline: Expand any capability to see how it fits your workflow. No demo call required.

items.title: Real-time dashboards
items.content: Live metrics update the moment data lands. Build a board in minutes with drag-and-drop tiles, then share a link your whole team can read without a login.

items.title: Automated reports
items.content: Schedule branded PDF or Slack summaries daily, weekly, or monthly. Stakeholders get the numbers on time, so you stop rebuilding the same recap every Monday.

items.title: Role-based access
items.content: Invite teammates with viewer, editor, or admin roles. Sensitive revenue data stays visible only to the people who need it, audited on every change.

items.title: 150+ native integrations
items.content: Connect HubSpot, Stripe, Google Analytics, and Postgres in a few clicks. No CSV exports, no engineering tickets, no glue code to maintain.
